stories.title: Djokovic Demolishes Tsitsipas in 98 Minutes — Viral Ball Girl Prank Lights Up Centre Court

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Novak Djokovic to Stefanos Tsitsipas at Wimbledon, 2026:

6-3, 6-4, 6-2. 98 minutes. 33 winners. 7 unforced errors.

The match was over before it started. Djokovic is through to the third round without dropping a set. #Wimbledon2026

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Mid-match at Wimbledon, Djokovic asked a ball girl to trim tape off his shoulder with scissors.

Then pretended she'd cut him. Fake pain. Crowd erupted.

He's 39 years old, 13-2 against Tsitsipas, and still doing this. #Wimbledon2026

article.headline: Djokovic Flattens Tsitsipas in 98 Minutes at Wimbledon — Ball Girl Prank Becomes the Story Within the Story

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Djokovic def. Tsitsipas + Viral Prank

**Social Image (1080x1350):**
- Search term: "Novak Djokovic Wimbledon"
- Notes: Djokovic in a celebratory fist-pump on Centre Court grass. The viral prank added audience delight — look for a smiling or expressive reaction shot.

**Article Hero (1200x630):**
- Search term: "Novak Djokovic tennis"
- Notes: Djokovic mid-serve or crouched in characteristic return-of-serve position. Classic tennis action shot on grass.

---

research.facts:
Djokovic def. Tsitsipas — Day 3
- **Score:** Djokovic def. Tsitsipas 6-3, 6-4, 6-2 — HIGH (bleacherreport.com, outlookindia.com, cbssports.com)
- **Match duration:** 1 hour 38 minutes — HIGH (bleacherreport.com, outlookindia.com)
- **First-serve points won:** 46 of 52 (Djokovic) — HIGH (bleacherreport.com, outlookindia.com)
- **Winners (Djokovic):** 33 — HIGH (bleacherreport.com, outlookindia.com)
- **Unforced errors (Djokovic):** 7 — HIGH (bleacherreport.com, outlookindia.com)
- **Match context:** Resumed from darkness suspension after Day 2 (June 30) — HIGH (prior day pipeline, cbssports.com)
- **Career H2H Djokovic–Tsitsipas:** 13-2 (was 12-2 before this match) — HIGH (prior day pipeline confirmed 12-2; this win makes 13-2)
- **Ball girl prank:** Djokovic asked ball girl to trim shoulder tape with scissors, pretended she cut him, cried out in fake pain; immediately apologized — HIGH (tennistemple.com, tennisuptodate.com, gbnews.com)
- **Prank timing:** During break between 2nd and 3rd sets while Tsitsipas briefly left court — HIGH (freepressjournal.in, tennistemple.com)
- **Djokovic quote (prank):** "Stefanos went to change so I had some spare time. I'm sorry if I scared her. I guess these kind of things surface when you're 2 sets to 0 up rather than 2 sets to 0 down." — HIGH (multiple sources)
- **Djokovic sets dropped:** 0 (into 3rd round without dropping a set) — HIGH (bleacherreport.com)

stories.title: Krejcikova Stuns French Open Champion Andreeva — Seven Match Points to Close It Out

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Barbora Krejcikova just knocked out Mirra Andreeva — the French Open champion — at Wimbledon.

Final: 4-6, 7-5, 6-4.

The defending Wimbledon champion defeats the defending Roland Garros champion. Only one trophy matters here. #Wimbledon2026

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Krejcikova needed 7 match points to close out Andreeva.

She still closed it out.

The defending champion is through at Wimbledon. The women's draw is wide open. #Wimbledon2026 #WTA

article.headline: Krejcikova Stuns No. 5 Seed Andreeva at Wimbledon — Defending Champion Needs Seven Match Points but Advances in Three Sets

stories.title: Sinner Needs Two Tiebreaks but Defends His Crown's Edge

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Jannik Sinner had to earn it on Day 3.

7-6(4), 7-6(2), 6-4 vs Nuno Borges. Two tiebreaks. 47 winners.

The defending champion is into the third round. No panic, just persistence. #Wimbledon2026

stories.title: Women's Day 3 — Sabalenka, Gauff, Osaka All Survive to Third Round

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Coco Gauff was a break down in the final-set tiebreak against Solana Sierra.

She came back. Won 7-6 in the third.

Big week for Gauff: still alive at Wimbledon. 6-3, 3-6, 7-6(7). #Wimbledon2026

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
Women's Day 3 at Wimbledon:

Sabalenka def. Kessler 6-1, 7-6(9) ✓
Gauff def. Sierra 6-3, 3-6, 7-6(7) ✓
Osaka def. Gasanova 6-3, 6-2 ✓

None of it was easy. All three through. #Wimbledon2026
